mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = #{grpNo} AND user_id = LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT grp_no, grp_name, grp_parent, #{userId} AS user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_topo_leaf WHERE grp_no = A.grp_no AND grp_no != sub_no) AS child_cnt FROM cm_topo_group A WHERE grp_parent = #{grpParent} AND user_id = ORDER BY grp_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_topo_link WHERE (item_no1 = #{itemNo} OR item_no2 = #{itemNo}) AND user_id =
SELECT point1, point2, point3 FROM cm_topo_link WHERE (item_no1 = #{itemNo} OR item_no2 = #{itemNo}) AND user_id =
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'POINT' AND dev_kind2 = 'POINT' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} AND item_no IN (#{point1}::bigint, #{point2}::bigint, #{point3}::bigint) AND user_id =
